About ZURC CONSTRUCTION-GENERAL CONTRACTOR IN PORTLAND,OR

12+ years serving Portland and surrounding areas

ZURC Construction started with a simple goal: to provide Portland homeowners with honest, reliable remodeling services. We saw a need for contractors who understood the unique challenges of Portland's climate and housing stock, from the moisture issues plaguing our Craftsman bungalows to the earthquake risks we face as a region. We're a local team, invested in this community.

Our approach is built on clear communication, meticulous planning, and unwavering attention to detail. We believe in transparency every step of the way, from initial consultation to final walkthrough. We use quality materials and proven techniques to ensure lasting results, standing behind our work with pride.

Portland is our home, and we're committed to giving back. We actively support local organizations and prioritize sustainable practices in our projects. We strive to minimize our environmental impact and contribute to a thriving, resilient Portland for generations to come.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members

Trusted remodeling contractor professionals serving Portland, OR and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
